data.name: Milfvania Ep. 1
data.detailed_description:
Milfvania tells the story of a young guy who got into trouble because of a girl (Julie) recruited for an amateur porn video. As a result, he had to move abroad, somewhere in post-Soviet Europe, where he met Lidia and her two daughters. But soon after, Julie follows him, and all the wicked and devilish things she does will turn out for the best.

Episodes can be played independently, as they each encapsulate fantasies on their own. It is a h-scene intensive (animated) game.



This episode features the following fetishes:
  • Netori (the player does the stealing)
  • Sneaky sex
  • Anal
  • Milf




This first episode introduces you to the Milfvania universe. It's a story about a young adult (the player) who leaves his home to live abroad in an ex-communist country. There you meet Lidia, your landlady, and her daughters, Nastya and Olga. You then have to make a living there while also enjoying the women!
The sex scenes that an episode contains can be seen in the screenshot area.

Male character and Julia (main antagonist)


The landlady and her daughters


Sneaking in Nastya's room at night.


Adult scenes are fully animated and plenty, carefully animated in a classical keyframe style.


  • post-Soviet aesthetics
  • focus on lewdness
  • ambiental music
  • animated sex scenes with sound
  • visual novel mechanic with choices
  • puzzle elements where you must help the girls or collaborate with them (collect objects required for the story; solve challenges)
  • adult scene gallery to help you see what scenes are yet to be unlocked


  • Q:Why episodes? A:Based on how the game is received the story will be longer or shorter.
  • Q:Are the episodes standalone?A:Yes, the episodes can be played independently, you don't need the save from the previous one.
  • Q:Episodes are too short. A: I took note of that, so Episode 3 is going to be the final one, way longer than 1 and 2.
  • Q:Why Ep. 1 looks different than Ep. 2? A: It was made a considerable time ago, but the animations were updated for the Steam release. But be sure once Ep. 3 (Final) is released I will also update the first two episodes with same art style.
  • Q:Q:Will first two episodes get more content? A:Yes, they will get padded with extra content and animations. Also free DLCs for the holidays.

data.short_description: An animated adult visual novel, set up in a post-soviet environment. Yes, you live with the landlady.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
